---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in Nex Life Logger
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: NexaiGuy
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what the bug is.

**To reproduce**
Steps to reproduce the behavior:
1. Run '...'
2. See error

**Expected behavior**
What you expected to happen.

**Environment**
- OS: [e.g. Windows 11, Ubuntu 24.04, macOS 15]
- Python version: [e.g. 3.11.9]
- Life Logger version: [e.g. 1.0.2]
- Installation method: [Desktop app / ClawHub skill]
- AI provider: [e.g. Qwen, OpenAI, Ollama]

**Logs**
If applicable, paste relevant log output from `~/.life-logger/life-logger.log` or `nex-life-logger service logs`.
